name_en: 👄FENDI New Clutch, FF jacquard pattern in dove grey, zip closure, accented with gold metal Fendi Roma lettering. Suede lining, gold and silver mixed-tone metal hardware. Equipped with dual handles: a removable leather handle and a tortoiseshell-effect organic glass chain handle featuring a large metal O'Lock logo, for hand-carry or underarm wear. Model: FD8068, Dimensions: 32*5*11cm
